name: Buttermilk Bread (Scottish)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Buttermilk or thick Sour milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven to 425°F/Gas 7. Grease and flour a baking sheet.
2. Mix all the dry ingredients together in a bowl.
3. Lightly rub in the butter.
4. Add the buttermilk and mix to a light, soft dough.
5. Divide into two and shape into rounds on a lightly floured surface.
6. Place the rounds on the baking sheet and bake for about 20 minutes.
7. Serve sliced with butter.
